title: lint verb
manager: The `lint` verb — static analysis of an FSL machine for the problems the grammar accepts but the author probably didn't mean: unreachable states, island subgraphs, undeclared references, style issues. This is the first line of the CLI tooling story and the thing CI runs on every machine; it catches the mistakes that are legal FSL but wrong intent, before they reach a diagram or a user.
cs: `lint` verb (§25); reachability/island/undeclared-ref/style checks; jssm twin #620; feeds `lint --future` (W6.94).
